content_body: We are enjoying our last night of this lovely Thanksgiving family getaway... Our time would not have been as amazing had we not stayed in your beautiful cabin. My family absolutely enjoyed our days here. We visited downtown Blue Ridge, ate delicious pies from Mercier Orchards, and took countless pictures to capture every single moment. As we are sipping our hot cocoa on this last evening by the fireplace, we are already planning our next Thanksgiving up here and making it an annual family tradition. Until next year, Bella Vista Lodge! Thank you for all the indelible memories!
title: Our New Family Tradition!
